headline: Conquistadors: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Conquistadors carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 90.46, led by Josh Allen, Puka Nacua, and Bijan Robinson. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Juwan Johnson at 63.5 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Josh Allen (99.6), Puka Nacua (99.6), and Bijan Robinson (99.4).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Juwan Johnson is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 63.5. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 11 offensive players, with 3 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 81.05.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
